cover.title: what shipped this week
cover.sub: our context layer went public beta, and the savings dashboard went live. the receipts:

slides.title: shipped
items: the context layer flipped to public beta: open source, install and star, no signup gate
live savings dashboard, running on our own fleet
evidence write-ups: METR, DORA, GitClear, Stanford, Apple, ETH

slides.title: next, in the open
slides.body: the orchestration layer: how a fleet of agents coordinates, hands off, and stays legible to a human. building it in public.

cta.title: in the open
cta.sub: public beta. open source. install and star.
